controls: maker/checker separation (submitter may not approve own document)
amount-threshold approval (over threshold requires a separate approver role)
GL/stock posting occurs only on transition to Submitted via a caller-supplied delegate
posted documents immutable; corrections via cancel/reversal
makerCheckerEngine.states: Draft -> PendingApproval -> Submitted (posted) ; Reject (with reason) ; Cancel/reversal

tests: Covered across WorkflowTests.cs, AccountingTests.cs, ManufacturingTests.cs and the scenario libraries (part of the 255 xUnit total).
notImplemented: Delivery-note document chain (DeliveryNote is a CRUD skeleton; no Sales-Order -> Delivery-Note -> Sales-Invoice fulfilment chain with stock relief)
Sales/Purchase return chains (CreditNote / DebitNote exist as CRUD skeletons; they do NOT reverse stock or GL)
Partial delivery / partial receipt against an order
honest: Maker/checker lifecycle for the four financial documents and the new production-order lifecycle are real and tested. Delivery-note and return (reverse) document chains were NOT added this sprint.
